title: ononis viscosa subsp. foetida
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. foetida, also known as stinking bee plant, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Ononis viscosa subsp. foetida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical creams and ointments to treat skin irritations and wounds.
